privileged_info_summary: The task requires researching three 2024 model year electric vehicles from fueleconomy.gov. EPA Combined Range values are: Tesla Model 3 Long Range AWD-E: 341 miles; Hyundai IONIQ 5 Long Range AWD: 260 miles; Ford F-150 Lightning 4WD Extended Range: 320 miles. All metadata expected range values (Tesla 330-350, Hyundai 250-270, Ford 310-330) correctly bracket these actual EPA values. Five-year fuel cost savings compared to average new vehicle are: Tesla $4,750, Hyundai $4,000, Ford $2,250. The data originates from the official fueleconomy.gov website, which is a real U.S. government resource, not synthetic data.
